problems.title: Instance, Class, and Static Methods
problems.description: Create a `Student` class with three marks, an `avg()` instance method, a `get_school()` class method, and an `info()` static method. Inside main(), create a student, print the average, print the school name, and call the static method. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Create a `Student` class with three marks, an `avg()` instance method, a `get_school()` class method, and an `info()` static method. Inside main(), create a student, print the average, print the school name, and call the static method.

examples.input:
Use the sample setup:
s1 = Student(34, 47, 32)
s2 = Student(89, 32, 112)
Student.info()
examples.output:
37.666666666666664
Telusko
this is a static method

test_cases.expected_output:
37.666666666666664
Telusko
this is a static method
test_cases.label: Test 1
